title: NASA Is Sending Humans Back to the Moon (THIS MONTH)
description:
NASA is sending humans farther from Earth than ever before. 

This is the second of three planned NASA missions to go back to the moon, in hopes of eventually establishing a moon colony. 

This mission, Artemis II, is about testing the spacecraft, Orion, during a 10 day trip around earth and the moon while checking the ship’s life support, navigation, communication, and radiation shelter. 

If all goes well, the third and final mission will have humans landing back on the moon for the first time in 50 years! 

To see more about that, subscribe!

#NASA #space #Artemis #moon #science #shorts
